name: legal-down
description: Local-first repair for broken legal-document numbering and cross-references.

scripts.build:pages: pnpm --filter @legal-down/core build && pnpm --filter @legal-down/web build && pnpm --filter @legal-down/addin build && cp -R packages/addin/dist packages/web/dist/addin
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
